heading: fs
body:
Atlas Functions support the following `fs` APIs:

- [accessSync](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/fs.html#fs_fs_accesssync_path_mode)

- [constants](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/fs.html#fs_fs_constants)

- [lstatSync](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/fs.html#fs_fs_lstatsync_path_options)

- [readFileSync](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/fs.html#fs_fs_readfilesync_path_options)

- [statSync](https://nodejs.org/docs/v10.18.1/api/fs.html#fs_fs_statsync_path_options)
